speaker: SCALES
text: How now? Is Jack Cade slain?

speaker:
FIRST
               
              CITIZEN
text: No, my lord, nor likely to be slain; for

speaker:
FIRST
               
              CITIZEN
text: they have won the Bridge, killing all those that

speaker:
FIRST
               
              CITIZEN
text: withstand them. The Lord Mayor craves aid of

speaker:
FIRST
               
              CITIZEN
text: your Honor from the Tower to defend the city

speaker: SCALES
text: Such aid as I can spare you shall command;

speaker: SCALES
text: But I am troubled here with them myself:

speaker: SCALES
text: The rebels have essayed to win the Tower.

speaker: SCALES
text: But get you to Smithfield and gather head,

speaker: SCALES
text: And thither I will send you Matthew Gough.

speaker: SCALES
text: Fight for your king, your country, and your lives.

speaker: SCALES
text: And so farewell, for I must hence again.
